name: Fromage Fondue
recipeIngredient: 213 grams Canned Alaska salmon (pink or red)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the can of salmon in a food processor or blender.
2. Add the fromage frais, cheese, soy sauce, and tomato puree.
3. Blend until smooth.
4. Stir in the chopped tomatoes.
5. Serve with fresh vegetable sticks and cubes of bread.
Serves 10-15. Approx. 85 kcals per serving
